notes: Adds 12 character-gear upgrade items (4 categories × 3 tiers): inventory capacity, suit battery capacity, oxygen capacity, hydrogen capacity. All crafted at the vanilla Gearforge 2.5 m. Mk 2 consumes Mk 1, Mk 3 consumes Mk 2 — matches vanilla Drill Mk 1/2/3 tier-chaining. SCHEMA CHANGE: local resource-item.schema.json extends the character-gear subcategory enum with 'upgrade' (first mod to evolve a base-game enum) and adds a structured `effects` object with category-specific capacity multipliers (1.5×/2×/3× for Mk 1/2/3; replace-not-additive). DECLARATIVE-ONLY HOOK: the Gearforge 2.5 m block record in base-game does NOT list our upgrade ids in its production.producesIds — downstream code mods reading that list won't see these upgrades, matching Forestry's fruits/resin precedent. Backpack itself is not a modeled entity in base-game data, so top-tier (Mk 3) upgrades have usedIn: [] with a corresponding dataGaps entry.

datasets.description: Twelve backpack/suit upgrade items across four categories (inventory, battery, oxygen, hydrogen) in three tiers each (Mk 1/2/3). Each carries a structured `effects` object with a single capacity multiplier.
